sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value Float32, text String);
SELECT sqidEncode(value) FROM test_table WHERE value = ANY (SELECT MIN(value) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AND text IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*), sqidEncode(id) FROM test_table GROUP BY sqidEncode(id) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT id, sqidEncode(value, value + 1) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL AND value = ANY (SELECT DISTINCT value FROM test_table);
CREATE TABLE another_table (id UInt32, value Nullable(Float32));
SELECT t1.id, sqidEncode(t1.value) FROM test_table t1 JOIN another_table t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t1.value = ANY (SELECT value FROM another_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL);
SELECT sqidEncode(MIN(value)) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE text LIKE '%test%') GROUP BY value HAVING MIN(value) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT sqidEncode((SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL), MAX(value) FROM test_table) AS encoded_values WHERE encoded_values IS NOT NULL;
